trend_signal: Remote work and hybrid office setups continue to dominate workplace trends in 2024.
stock_safe_concept: A clean, minimalist home office setup featuring a laptop, notebook, coffee cup, and potted plant on a wooden desk with natural light streaming through a window.
buyer_use_cases: Website hero images, blog posts about productivity, remote work guides, office furniture ads.
visual_elements: Laptop, notebook, coffee cup, green plant, wooden desk, natural lighting, neutral tones.
risk_notes: No identifiable persons or brands; generic objects only.
score_reason: Highly relevant to ongoing remote work trend; visually appealing and broadly applicable for commercial use.

trend_signal: Sustainability and eco-friendliness remain key consumer priorities.
stock_safe_concept: Flat lay of reusable items such as stainless steel water bottle, bamboo toothbrush, cloth shopping bag, and organic cotton produce bags on a natural fiber background.
buyer_use_cases: Sustainability blogs, eco-product packaging, social media marketing for green brands, educational materials.
visual_elements: Reusable water bottle, bamboo toothbrush, cloth bags, organic textures, natural fibers, soft natural light.
risk_notes: No branding on products; generic eco-friendly items only.
score_reason: Strong alignment with sustainability trend; versatile for various green lifestyle content.

trend_signal: Rise in interest in healthy eating and plant-based diets.
stock_safe_concept: Overhead shot of a vibrant plant-based meal prep setup with glass containers filled with fresh vegetables, grains, legumes, and herbs on a kitchen counter.
buyer_use_cases: Recipe websites, nutritional blogs, meal delivery service marketing, health magazines.
visual_elements: Glass containers, assorted vegetables, grains, legumes, fresh herbs, kitchen counter, bright lighting.
risk_notes: No brand packaging visible; generic food items only.
score_reason: Meets growing demand for healthy eating visuals; colorful and appealing for commercial food content.

trend_signal: Wellness and mindfulness practices gaining mainstream attention.
stock_safe_concept: Minimalist corner with a meditation cushion, small indoor plant, candles, and soft natural light creating a peaceful atmosphere.
buyer_use_cases: Wellness blogs, apps for meditation, mental health campaigns, lifestyle magazine spreads.
visual_elements: Meditation cushion, indoor plant, candles, soft natural window light, neutral calming colors.
risk_notes: No people or identifiable personal items; generic props only.
score_reason: Fits wellness trend well; visually soothing and broadly usable for mental health and lifestyle content.

trend_signal: Tech innovation in smart home devices is trending upward.
topic: Smart home technology in living room
stock_safe_concept: A modern living room showcasing smart speaker, smart lighting, and tablet control panel on a coffee table, emphasizing connected home environment.
buyer_use_cases: Tech blogs, smart home product ads, IoT industry marketing, home automation tutorials.
visual_elements: Smart speaker, tablet, ambient smart lighting, contemporary furniture, clean design.
risk_notes: Avoid branded devices; ensure all gadgets are generic and non-identifiable.
score_reason: Captures growing smart home trend; clean and modern setup appealing to tech-related buyers.
